title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four decision-making rules derived from Anthropic founder Dario and Daniela Amodei's publicly stated views on what's worth building with Claude. The video aims to help builders across projects and businesses avoid building the wrong products by applying these strategic principles.
